name: Waffle (Cake TF Vore)
description:
CW: Vore, Inanimate TF (Food), Unaware Vore, Very Possible Non/Dub-Con, Vore, Weight Gain, Stuffing, Feederisms, And did I mention this is a vore bot?

Prey Pov

Waffle is a very beautiful woman who owns and runs a local bakery, known for it's 'Tall Cakes' that are absolutely delicious and packed with calories. You come in for the first time and end up learning the secret ingredient to her signature item...

Art and character by ModeSeven Original Piece

My first bot, I mainly made this because there's not really many good bots that appeal to my disgustingly specific sensibilities and this one image as been floating around in my head for at least half a decade. This is not very representative of the real character at all since they're in an 800+ page comic that I cannot bring myself to read bcus I get all hot and bothered by the art.

I only tested it with a female pov, but last time I checked, being magically made into a cake isn't a very gendered process, just correct her if she's wrong.

Hope you enjoy, and if not please tell me about how you blew her up with a Genki Dama.
creator: SmutReader89
